entry.title: New: BILL019(25) (Honolulu) — CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Zoning, to Zoning & Planning Committee.
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE BUILDING CODE.

Amends City Building Code (Ordinance 24-15) Amendment (13), which amends International Building Code Section 107.4 relating to amended construction documents.

Latest action: CC-181(25) - Bill re-referred from Zoning, to Zoning & Planning Committee.

View on the council site
